source_excerpt: 6149: 	/* Determin the size of the file first */
6159: 	/* Count the number of data blocks */
6173: 	 * Count the number of extent tree blocks. We do it by looking up
6174: 	 * two successive extents and determining the difference between
6175: 	 * their paths. When path is different for 2 successive extents
6176: 	 * we compare the blocks in the path at each level and increment
6177: 	 * iblocks by total number of differences found.
